ddls:
CREATE TABLE "data_series" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data series */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data (e.g., population, GDP, unemployment rate) */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the data (e.g., yearly, quarterly, monthly) */,
  "region" TEXT /* Geographic region the data pertains to */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "start_year" INTEGER /* Year when the data series starts */,
  "end_year" INTEGER /* Year when the data series ends */,
  "y_2010" INTEGER /* Data for the year 2010 */,
  "y_2012" INTEGER /* Data for the year 2012 */,
  "y_2014" INTEGER /* Data for the year 2014 */,
  "y_2015" INTEGER /* Data for the year 2015 */,
  "y_2016" INTEGER /* Data for the year 2016 */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_series_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the data source */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data provided by the source */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL to the data source */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the data was last updated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, policymaker, public) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author who created the report */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date the report was published */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the report's findings */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, published, archived) */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Date when the report was last modified */,
  "data_series_ids" TEXT /* JSON array of data series IDs used in the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the report */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the report */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the browser/device used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_access_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visualizations" (
  "viz_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visualization */,
  "data_series_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data series used for the visualization */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the visualization */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the visualization was created */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the visualization */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of visualization (e.g., line chart, bar chart, pie chart) */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Date when the visualization was last modified */,
  "data_series_ids" TEXT /* JSON array of data series IDs used in the visualization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("viz_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visualizations_data_series_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_series_id") REFERENCES data_series ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_exports" (
  "export_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data export */,
  "data_series_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data series exported */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who exported the data */,
  "export_date" TEXT /* Date the data was exported */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the exported file */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the exported data file */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the export (e.g., pending, completed, failed) */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the exported file in bytes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("export_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_exports_data_series_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_series_id") REFERENCES data_series ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_exports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaborations" (
  "collab_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report involved in the collaboration */,
  "viz_id" INTEGER /* ID of the visualization involved in the collaboration */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user participating in the collaboration */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the collaboration */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the collaboration */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the collaboration */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the collaboration (e.g., active, completed) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments or notes related to the collaboration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collab_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
